# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release and Publish

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+'
      - 'v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc.[0-9]+'
      - 'v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-beta.[0-9]+'
      - 'v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-alpha.[0-9]+'

permissions: {}

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '20'
  PYTHON_VERSION: '3.12'

jobs:
  validate-tag:
    name: Validate Tag
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    outputs:
      version: ${{ steps.extract.outputs.version }}
      prerelease: ${{ steps.extract.outputs.prerelease }}
      tag_name: ${{ steps.extract.outputs.tag_name }}
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Verify tag is on main or release branch
        run: |
          TAG_COMMIT=$(git rev-list -n 1 "${{ github.ref_name }}")
          BRANCHES=$(git branch -r --contains "$TAG_COMMIT" | grep -E '(origin/main|origin/release/)' || true)
          if [ -z "$BRANCHES" ]; then
            echo "::error::Tag must be on main or a release branch"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Tag found on branches: $BRANCHES"

      - name: Extract version info
        id: extract
        run: |
          TAG_NAME="${{ github.ref_name }}"
          VERSION="${TAG_NAME#v}"

          # Validate semver format
          if ! echo "$VERSION" | grep -qE '^[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+(-[a-zA-Z]+\.[0-9]+)?$'; then
            echo "::error::Invalid version format: $VERSION"
            exit 1
          fi

          # Determine if prerelease
          if echo "$VERSION" | grep -qE '-(alpha|beta|rc)\.'; then
            PRERELEASE="true"
          else
            PRERELEASE="false"
          fi

          echo "version=$VERSION" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "prerelease=$PRERELEASE" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "tag_name=$TAG_NAME" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Verify tag signature
        run: |
          # Verify the tag exists and optionally check for signed tags
          git tag -v "${{ github.ref_name }}" 2>/dev/null || echo "::warning::Tag is not GPG signed. Consider signing release tags."

  build-node:
    name: Build Node.js Package
    needs: validate-tag
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'

      - name: Verify package version matches tag
        run: |
          PACKAGE_VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
          TAG_VERSION="${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.version }}"
          if [ "$PACKAGE_VERSION" != "$TAG_VERSION" ]; then
            echo "::error::package.json version ($PACKAGE_VERSION) does not match tag version ($TAG_VERSION)"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --ignore-scripts

      - name: Run security audit
        run: npm audit --audit-level=high || true

      - name: Lint
        run: npm run lint --if-present

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test --if-present

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build --if-present

      - name: Generate package tarball
        run: npm pack

      - name: Calculate checksums
        run: |
          sha256sum *.tgz > node-checksums-sha256.txt
          cat node-checksums-sha256.txt

      - name: Upload Node.js artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: node-package
          path: |
            *.tgz
            node-checksums-sha256.txt
          retention-days: 5
          if-no-files-found: error

  build-python:
    name: Build Python Package
    needs: validate-tag
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Install build dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install build twine setuptools wheel

      - name: Verify package version matches tag
        run: |
          TAG_VERSION="${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.version }}"
          # Try pyproject.toml first, then setup.cfg, then setup.py
          if [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
            PACKAGE_VERSION=$(python -c "
          import tomllib
          with open('pyproject.toml', 'rb') as f:
              data = tomllib.load(f)
          print(data.get('project', {}).get('version', ''))
          ")
          elif [ -f "setup.cfg" ]; then
            PACKAGE_VERSION=$(python -c "
          import configparser
          config = configparser.ConfigParser()
          config.read('setup.cfg')
          print(config.get('metadata', 'version', fallback=''))
          ")
          else
            PACKAGE_VERSION=$(python setup.py --version 2>/dev/null)
          fi

          if [ -z "$PACKAGE_VERSION" ]; then
            echo "::warning::Could not determine Python package version. Skipping version check."
          elif [ "$PACKAGE_VERSION" != "$TAG_VERSION" ]; then
            echo "::error::Python package version ($PACKAGE_VERSION) does not match tag version ($TAG_VERSION)"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Install package dependencies
        run: |
          if [ -f "requirements.txt" ]; then
            pip install -r requirements.txt
          elif [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
            pip install ".[dev]" 2>/dev/null || pip install "." 2>/dev/null || true
          fi

      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          if [ -f "pytest.ini" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ] || [ -d "tests" ]; then
            pip install pytest --quiet
            python -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short || true
          fi

      - name: Build package
        run: python -m build

      - name: Verify package
        run: twine check dist/*

      - name: Calculate checksums
        run: |
          cd dist
          sha256sum * > ../python-checksums-sha256.txt
          cat ../python-checksums-sha256.txt

      - name: Upload Python artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: python-package
          path: |
            dist/
            python-checksums-sha256.txt
          retention-days: 5
          if-no-files-found: error

  generate-changelog:
    name: Generate Changelog
    needs: validate-tag
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    outputs:
      changelog: ${{ steps.changelog.outputs.changelog }}
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Generate changelog from commits
        id: changelog
        run: |
          # Find previous tag
          CURRENT_TAG="${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.tag_name }}"
          PREVIOUS_TAG=$(git tag --sort=-version:refname | grep -E '^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+' | grep -v "$CURRENT_TAG" | head -n 1)

          if [ -z "$PREVIOUS_TAG" ]; then
            RANGE="$CURRENT_TAG"
            COMPARE_TEXT="Initial release"
          else
            RANGE="${PREVIOUS_TAG}..${CURRENT_TAG}"
            COMPARE_TEXT="**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/compare/${PREVIOUS_TAG}...${CURRENT_TAG}"
          fi

          # Generate categorized changelog
          {
            echo "## What's Changed"
            echo ""

            # Breaking changes
            BREAKING=$(git log "$RANGE" --pretty=format:"%s (%h)" --grep="^BREAKING\|^breaking\|!" | head -20)
            if [ -n "$BREAKING" ]; then
              echo "### ⚠️ Breaking Changes"
              echo "$BREAKING" | sed 's/^/- /'
              echo ""
            fi

            # Features
            FEATURES=$(git log "$RANGE" --pretty=format:"%s (%h)" --grep="^feat" | head -30)
            if [ -n "$FEATURES" ]; then
              echo "### 🚀 Features"
              echo "$FEATURES" | sed 's/^/- /'
              echo ""
            fi

            # Bug fixes
            FIXES=$(git log "$RANGE" --pretty=format:"%s (%h)" --grep="^fix" | head -30)
            if [ -n "$FIXES" ]; then
              echo "### 🐛 Bug Fixes"
              echo "$FIXES" | sed 's/^/- /'
              echo ""
            fi

            # Performance
            PERF=$(git log "$RANGE" --pretty=format:"%s (%h)" --grep="^perf" | head -20)
            if [ -n "$PERF" ]; then
              echo "### ⚡ Performance"
              echo "$PERF" | sed 's/^/- /'
              echo ""
            fi

            # Documentation
            DOCS=$(git log "$RANGE" --pretty=format:"%s (%h)" --grep="^docs" | head -20)
            if [ -n "$DOCS" ]; then
              echo "### 📚 Documentation"
              echo "$DOCS" | sed 's/^/- /'
              echo ""
            fi

            # Other changes (chore, refactor, ci, style, test)
            OTHER=$(git log "$RANGE" --pretty=format:"%s (%h)" --grep="^chore\|^refactor\|^ci\|^style\|^test\|^build" | head -20)
            if [ -n "$OTHER" ]; then
              echo "### 🔧 Other Changes"
              echo "$OTHER" | sed 's/^/- /'
              echo ""
            fi

            echo "---"
            echo "$COMPARE_TEXT"
          } > changelog.md

          # Output for use in release
          {
            echo "changelog<<CHANGELOG_EOF"
            cat changelog.md
            echo "CHANGELOG_EOF"
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Upload changelog
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: changelog
          path: changelog.md
          retention-days: 5

  create-github-release:
    name: Create GitHub Release
    needs:
      - validate-tag
      - build-node
      - build-python
      - generate-changelog
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write
      attestations: write
      id-token: write
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - name: Download Node.js artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: node-package
          path: artifacts/node

      - name: Download Python artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: python-package
          path: artifacts/python

      - name: Download changelog
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: changelog
          path: artifacts

      - name: Prepare release assets
        run: |
          mkdir -p release-assets

          # Copy Node.js packages
          cp artifacts/node/*.tgz release-assets/ 2>/dev/null || true
          cp artifacts/node/node-checksums-sha256.txt release-assets/ 2>/dev/null || true

          # Copy Python packages
          cp artifacts/python/dist/* release-assets/ 2>/dev/null || true
          cp artifacts/python/python-checksums-sha256.txt release-assets/ 2>/dev/null || true

          # Create combined checksums file
          cd release-assets
          sha256sum *.tgz *.tar.gz *.whl 2>/dev/null | grep -v checksums > checksums-sha256.txt || true
          cat checksums-sha256.txt

      - name: Generate artifact attestations
        uses: actions/attest-build-provenance@v1
        with:
          subject-path: 'release-assets/*'

      - name: Create GitHub Release
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
        with:
          tag_name: ${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.tag_name }}
          name: Release ${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.tag_name }}
          body: ${{ needs.generate-changelog.outputs.changelog }}
          draft: false
          prerelease: ${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.prerelease == 'true' }}
          files: release-assets/*
          fail_on_unmatched_files: false
          generate_release_notes: false

  publish-npm:
    name: Publish to npm
    needs:
      - validate-tag
      - create-github-release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
    environment:
      name: npm
      url: https://www.npmjs.com/package/${{ steps.pkg-name.outputs.name }}
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'

      - name: Get package name
        id: pkg-name
        run: |
          NAME=$(node -p "require('./package.json').name")
          echo "name=$NAME" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Download Node.js artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: node-package
          path: artifacts

      - name: Verify artifact checksums
        run: |
          cd artifacts
          sha256sum -c node-checksums-sha256.txt

      - name: Determine npm tag
        id: npm-tag
        run: |
          VERSION="${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.version }}"
          if echo "$VERSION" | grep -q "alpha"; then
            echo "tag=alpha" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif echo "$VERSION" | grep -q "beta"; then
            echo "tag=beta" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif echo "$VERSION" | grep -q "rc"; then
            echo "tag=rc" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "tag=latest" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Publish to npm
        run: |
          npm publish artifacts/*.tgz \
            --tag ${{ steps.npm-tag.outputs.tag }} \
            --provenance \
            --access public
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}

      - name: Verify published package
        run: |
          sleep 10
          PACKAGE_NAME="${{ steps.pkg-name.outputs.name }}"
          VERSION="${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.version }}"
          npm view "${PACKAGE_NAME}@${VERSION}" version

  publish-pypi:
    name: Publish to PyPI
    needs:
      - validate-tag
      - create-github-release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
    environment:
      name: pypi
      url: https://pypi.org/project/${{ steps.pkg-name.outputs.name }}/${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.version }}
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Get package name
        id: pkg-name
        run: |
          if [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
            NAME=$(python3 -c "
          import tomllib
          with open('pyproject.toml', 'rb') as f:
              data = tomllib.load(f)
          print(data.get('project', {}).get('name', 'unknown'))
          ")
          else
            NAME="unknown"
          fi
          echo "name=$NAME" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Download Python artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: python-package
          path: artifacts

      - name: Verify artifact checksums
        run: |
          cd artifacts
          sha256sum -c python-checksums-sha256.txt

      - name: Publish to PyPI
        uses: pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish@release/v1
        with:
          packages-dir: artifacts/dist/
          attestations: true

      - name: Verify published package
        run: |
          sleep 30
          PACKAGE_NAME="${{ steps.pkg-name.outputs.name }}"
          VERSION="${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.version }}"
          pip install --dry-run "${PACKAGE_NAME}==${VERSION}" --index-url https://pypi.org/simple/ || echo "::warning::Package may not be available yet on PyPI. It can take a few minutes."

  post-release:
    name: Post-Release Notifications
    needs:
      - validate-tag
      - create-github-release
      - publish-npm
      - publish-pypi
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: always()
    permissions:
      contents: read
      issues: write
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - name: Determine release status
        id: status
        run: |
          NPM_STATUS="${{ needs.publish-npm.result }}"
          PYPI_STATUS="${{ needs.publish-pypi.result }}"
          RELEASE_STATUS="${{ needs.create-github-release.result }}"

          if [ "$RELEASE_STATUS" = "success" ] && [ "$NPM_STATUS" = "success" ] && [ "$PYPI_STATUS" = "success" ]; then
            echo "overall=success" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "emoji=✅" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "message=All release steps completed successfully" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "overall=partial" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "emoji=⚠️" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "message=Release completed with issues - GitHub: $RELEASE_STATUS, npm: $NPM_STATUS, PyPI: $PYPI_STATUS" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Create release summary
        run: |
          {
            echo "## Release Summary ${{ steps.status.outputs.emoji }}"
            echo ""
            echo "**Version:** ${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.tag_name }}"
            echo "**Prerelease:** ${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.prerelease }}"
            echo ""
            echo "### Status"
            echo "| Step | Status |"
            echo "|------|--------|"
            echo "| GitHub Release | ${{ needs.create-github-release.result }} |"
            echo "| npm Publish | ${{ needs.publish-npm.result }} |"
            echo "| PyPI Publish | ${{ needs.publish-pypi.result }} |"
            echo ""
            echo "${{ steps.status.outputs.message }}"
          } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"

      - name: Create issue on failure
        if: steps.status.outputs.overall != 'success'
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const version = '${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.tag_name }}';
            const runUrl = `https://github.com/${context.repo.owner}/${context.repo.repo}/actions/runs/${context.runId}`;

            await github.rest.issues.create({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              title: `⚠️ Release ${version} completed with issues`,
              body: `## Release Pipeline Issue\n\n` +
                    `The release pipeline for **${version}** completed with issues.\n\n` +
                    `### Status\n` +
                    `- GitHub Release: ${{ needs.create-github-release.result }}\n` +
                    `- npm Publish: ${{ needs.publish-npm.result }}\n` +
                    `- PyPI Publish: ${{ needs.publish-pypi.result }}\n\n` +
                    `### Action Required\n` +
                    `Please review the [workflow run](${runUrl}) and manually retry any failed steps.\n\n` +
                    `cc @${context.actor}`,
              labels: ['release', 'bug', 'automated']
            });
